content.text: Hey! How can I help today? I can draft emails, schedule meetings, set reminders, summarize docs, or look things up.

content: can u email aryan and check how is he doing

content.text:
I found Aryan’s email: aryanjainak@gmail.com. Here’s a quick draft—want me to send it as-is?

Subject: Checking in
Body:
Hey Aryan,
Just wanted to check in and see how you’re doing. How have things been lately? Would love to catch up when you have a minute.
Take care,
[Your Name]

Would you like any tweaks to the tone or to add your signature/CC someone?
